targets.rawSql:
SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED

DECLARE @STA_DT       DATETIME
DECLARE @END_DT       DATETIME
DECLARE @ServerName   VARCHAR(30)
DECLARE @DatabaseName VARCHAR(30)
DECLARE @InstanceID   NUMERIC(4)

SET @ServerName   = '$ServerName'
SET @DatabaseName = '$DatabaseName'


-- 시작일, 종료일 변수 생성
SELECT  @STA_DT = MIN(T1.CollectDate)
       ,@END_DT = MAX(T1.CollectDate)
       ,@InstanceID = MAX(T3.InstanceID)
FROM    TBL2_M_TableInfo T1 WITH (NOLOCK)
       ,META2_M_InstanceInfo T3 WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE   1=1
--T1
AND     $__timeFilter(T1.CollectDate)
AND     T3.ServerName = @ServerName
AND     T1.databaseName = @DatabaseName
--T3
AND     T1.InstanceID = T3.InstanceID


SELECT T1.databaseName                                              AS "Database"
      ,T1.TableName                                                 AS "Table Name"
      ,T1.STA_DT                                                    AS "Start Date"
      ,T1.END_DT                                                    AS "End Date"      
      ,T1.Initial_Size / 1024.0 / 1024.0                            AS "Initial Size(GB)"
      ,T1.Final_Size / 1024.0 / 1024.0                              AS "Final Size(GB)"
      ,T1.Increase / 1024.0 / 1024.0                                AS "Table_Increase(GB)"
      ,CASE WHEN T1.Increase = 0 or T1.Final_Size = 0 THEN '0.00'
      	     ELSE FORMAT(T1.Increase / T1.Final_Size * 100, '0.00') 
       END                                                          AS "Table_Increase(%)"       
      ,CASE WHEN T1.Total_Size > 0 THEN FORMAT((T1.Final_Size / T1.Total_Size) * 100       , '0.00') ELSE '0.00' END AS "Table/Total Size(%)"  
      ,CASE WHEN T1.Increase = 0 or T1.Total_Increase_Size = 0 THEN '0.00'
            ELSE FORMAT((T1.Increase / T1.Total_Increase_Size) * 100, '0.00') 
       END                                                          AS "Table/Total Increase Size(%)"
      ,T1.Total_Increase_Size / 1024.0 / 1024.0                     AS "Total_Increase_Size(GB)"
      ,T1.Total_Size / 1024.0 / 1024.0                              AS "Total_Size(GB)"       
      ,CASE WHEN T1.Total_Size > 0 THEN FORMAT(T1.Total_Increase_Size / T1.Total_Size * 100, '0.00') ELSE '0.00' END AS "Total_Increase(%)"
FROM	(
        SELECT  T2.databaseName                                               
               ,T2.TableName                                                  
               ,SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR, T1.CollectDate, 120),1,10)                    AS STA_DT
               ,SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR, T2.CollectDate, 120),1,10)                    AS END_DT
               ,(T1.DataKB + T1.IndexKB) * 1.0                                           AS Initial_Size
               ,(T2.DataKB + T2.IndexKB) * 1.0                                           AS Final_Size
               ,((T2.DataKB + T2.IndexKB) * 1.0  - (T1.DataKB + T1.IndexKB) * 1.0) * 1.0 AS Increase
               ,SUM(T2.DataKB + T2.IndexKB) OVER() *1.0                                  AS Total_Size
               ,SUM((T2.DataKB + T2.IndexKB) - (T1.DataKB + T1.IndexKB)) OVER() * 1.0    AS Total_Increase_Size
        FROM    TBL2_M_TableInfo T2 WITH (NOLOCK) --MAX
        LEFT JOIN TBL2_M_TableInfo T1 WITH (NOLOCK) --MIN
        ON      1=1
        AND     T1.InstanceID = T1.InstanceID        
        AND     T1.databaseName = T2.databaseName
        AND     T1.TableName = T2.TableName        
        AND     T1.CollectDate BETWEEN DATEADD(ss, -1, @STA_DT) AND DATEADD(ss, 1, @STA_DT)
        JOIN    META2_M_InstanceInfo T3 WITH (NOLOCK)
        ON      1=1
        AND     T1.InstanceID = T3.InstanceID
        AND     T3.ServerName = @ServerName
        WHERE   1=1
        --T2
        AND     T2.InstanceID = @InstanceID
        AND     T2.databaseName = @DatabaseName
        AND     T2.CollectDate BETWEEN DATEADD(ss, -1, @END_DT) AND DATEADD(ss, 1, @END_DT)
		) T1
ORDER BY T1.Increase DESC, T1.Initial_Size DESC

SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED

DECLARE @STA_DT       DATETIME
DECLARE @END_DT       DATETIME
DECLARE @ServerName   VARCHAR(30)
DECLARE @DatabaseName VARCHAR(30)
DECLARE @InstanceID   NUMERIC(4)

SET @ServerName   = '$ServerName'
SET @DatabaseName = '$DatabaseName'


-- 시작일, 종료일 변수 생성
SELECT  @STA_DT = MIN(T1.CollectDate)
       ,@END_DT = MAX(T1.CollectDate)
			 ,@InstanceID = MAX(T3.InstanceID)
FROM    TBL2_M_IndexUsage T1 WITH (NOLOCK)
       ,META2_M_InstanceInfo T3 WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE   1=1
--T1
AND     $__timeFilter(T1.CollectDate)
AND     T3.ServerName = @ServerName
AND     T1.databaseName = @DatabaseName
--T3
AND     T1.InstanceID = T3.InstanceID

SELECT 	T1.databaseName                                              AS "Database"
	,	T1.TableName                                                 AS "Table Name"
	,	T1.STA_DT                                                    AS "Start Date"
	,	T1.END_DT                                                    AS "End Date"      
	,	T1.Initial_Size / 1024.0 / 1024.0                            AS "Initial Size(GB)"
	,	T1.Final_Size / 1024.0 / 1024.0                              AS "Final Size(GB)"
	,	T1.Increase / 1024.0 / 1024.0                                AS "Table_Increase(GB)"
	,	CASE WHEN T1.Increase = 0 or T1.Final_Size = 0 THEN '0.00'
			 ELSE FORMAT(T1.Increase / T1.Final_Size * 100, '0.00') 
		END                                                          AS "Table_Increase(%)"       
	,	CASE WHEN T1.Total_Size > 0 THEN FORMAT((T1.Final_Size / T1.Total_Size) * 100       , '0.00') ELSE '0.00' END AS "Table/Total Size(%)"  
	,	CASE WHEN T1.Increase = 0 or T1.Total_Increase_Size = 0 THEN '0.00'
			 ELSE FORMAT((T1.Increase / T1.Total_Increase_Size) * 100, '0.00') 
		END                                                          AS "Table/Total Increase Size(%)"
	,	T1.Total_Increase_Size / 1024.0 / 1024.0                     AS "Total_Increase_Size(GB)"
	,	T1.Total_Size / 1024.0 / 1024.0                              AS "Total_Size(GB)"       
	,	CASE WHEN T1.Total_Size > 0 THEN FORMAT(T1.Total_Increase_Size / T1.Total_Size * 100, '0.00') ELSE '0.00' END AS "Total_Increase(%)"
FROM	(
		SELECT  T2.databaseName                                               
			,	T2.ObjectName                                       AS "TableName"
			,	SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR, @STA_DT, 120),1,10)      AS "STA_DT"
			,	SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR, @END_DT, 120),1,10)      AS "END_DT"
			,	ISNULL(T1.SizeKB * 1.0, 0)                                     AS "Initial_Size"
			,	ISNULL(T2.SizeKB * 1.0, 0)                                     AS "Final_Size"
			,	ISNULL((T2.SizeKB * 1.0)  - (T1.SizeKB * 1.0) * 1.0, 0)        AS "Increase"
			,	SUM(T2.SizeKB) OVER() *1.0                          AS "Total_Size"
			,	SUM(T2.SizeKB - T1.SizeKB) OVER() * 1.0             AS "Total_Increase_Size"
		FROM	(
				SELECT	T1.InstanceID
					,	T1.databaseName
					,	T1.ObjectName
					,	MAX(T1.rowcnt) AS rowcnt
					,	SUM(T1.IndexSizeKB) AS SizeKB
				FROM	TBL2_M_IndexUsage T1 WITH (NOLOCK)
				WHERE	1=1
				AND		InstanceID = @InstanceID
				AND		databaseName = @DatabaseName
				AND		CollectDate BETWEEN DATEADD(ss, -1, @END_DT) AND DATEADD(ss, 1, @END_DT)
				GROUP BY T1.InstanceID, T1.databaseName, T1.ObjectName
				) T2
		LEFT JOIN	(
				SELECT	T1.InstanceID
					,	T1.databaseName
					,	T1.ObjectName
					,	MAX(T1.rowcnt) AS rowcnt
					,	SUM(T1.IndexSizeKB) AS SizeKB
				FROM	TBL2_M_IndexUsage T1 WITH (NOLOCK)
				WHERE	1=1
				AND		InstanceID = @InstanceID
				AND		databaseName = @DatabaseName
				AND		CollectDate BETWEEN DATEADD(ss, -1, @STA_DT) AND DATEADD(ss, 1, @STA_DT)
				GROUP BY T1.InstanceID, T1.databaseName, T1.ObjectName
				) T1 
		ON		1=1
		AND		T1.InstanceID = T2.InstanceID
		AND		T1.databaseName = T2.databaseName
		AND		T1.ObjectName = T2.ObjectName
		) T1
ORDER BY T1.Increase DESC, T1.Initial_Size DESC
